sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n109569" key="u(po/xhla" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπόχηλα</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τά</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">χηλή</etym>) <sense id="n109569.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">part of the hand near the fingers,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:2:144" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.144</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
